Petition For Authority To Purchase In-Force Annuities; Issue Balance Of Cash To Special Needs Trust; Maintain A Reserve For Administrative Expenses; Pay Court Appointed Attorney; And Pay Conservator'S Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Aug-07-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Urbatsch for and with Wand Clifton. A Financial Advisor is also present.

Counsel presented a declaration regarding request for attorney's fees. The Court granted the Petition for Authority to Purchase In-Force Annuities, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition For Authority To Purchase In-Force Annuities; Issue Balance Of Cash To Special Needs Trust; Maintain A Reserve For Administrative Expenses; Pay Court Appointed Attorney; And Pay Conservator'S Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Continued To Aug-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Urbatsch for Wanda Clifton (Conservator).

Mr. Urbatsch presented oral argument to support his position with regard to the manner in which the funds are to be invested, stated that the Beneficiary would lose the tax free benefit if the funds pass to the Special Needs Trust, that the Trustee has weighed in on this and that he could file a declaration by the Trustee if needed. The Petition for Authority to Purchase In-Force Annuities, etc. was continued to August 6, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Urbastch to adddress the Court's concerns and provide more information with respect to the structure of the annuities, the Beneficiaries needs, etc.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION Petition To Establish The Wheeler Qualified Settlement Fund
Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Advanced From Oct-17-11 To Sep-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION Petition To Establish The Wheeler Qualified Settlement Fund
Off Calendar Sep-28-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Urbatsch, Jerry Hurtubise and Gregory Winslow for Wanda Clifton (Petitioner).

Counsel addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Application To Advance Hearing Date And For Order Shortening Notice Time On Petition To Establish The Wheeler Qualified Settlement Fund
